sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32857" key="e)ksaghneu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκσᾰγηνεύω</orth>, <sense id="n32857.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">entangle in the toils,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.52c</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
